message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant halon
participant ios1
participant ios2
participant client

note over halon, ios1, ios2, client
SNS operation start
note right of halon
notification [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
end note

loop [until all ios are ready]
    repair status request
    repair status reply
   spiel_repair_start
end loop

alt [successful case]
    notify [(pool, repaired), (disk, repaired)]
    SNS status query
    loop [until all ios are in IDLE]
        repair status request
        repair status reply [IDLE, IDLE]
    end loop
    notify [(pool, REPAIRED), (disk, REPAIRED)]
end alt

note right of halon
partial repair
    notify [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
    Abort SNS operation
end note

note right of halon
transient disk
    notify [(disk, transient)]
    Pause SNS operation
end note

note right of halon
failed disk
    notify [(disk, failed)]
    Abort SNS operation
end note

@enduml
